utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final solution includes all six named sections. Now check each for full specification: 1) property: includes selected property with details and price (address, type, price, size, description) — fully specified. 2) financing: 'financing solution with terms' — includes status, provider, pre-approval amount, interest rate/term, down payment — adequately specified. 3) legal_services: 'legal services with costs' — provides providers, selected package, and cost — specified. 4) moving_services: 'moving arrangements with costs' — provides providers, selected package, and cost — specified. 5) setup_services: 'utility and setup services' — includes service type, selected package, cost — specified. 6) total_budget: 'complete cost breakdown' — includes purchase price, down payment, mortgage amount, estimated upfront costs breakdown and total, and total initial cash outlay — specified. Thus, 6/6 fully specified.
